plan.title: Raccoon Knight summons with no sacrifice
plan.summary: Summon Raccoon Knight from hand with zero sacrifices and verify the summon requirement override ignores normal AL sacrifice requirements.

notes: Raccoon Knight text: this creature does not require a sacrifice to summon.

steps: Keep Raccoon Knight in player_1 hand with no sacrifice cards selected.
Summon Raccoon Knight as primary creature.
Verify the summon succeeded with zero sacrifices.

expectedAssertions.label: Raccoon Knight becomes the primary creature

manualVerification: Confirm the override applies despite armor level 12.
riskNotes: This fixture protects the text-based no-sacrifice summon requirement.
